Examples.Title: Add memories.
Examples.Code:
### Add memories.
# @name memories_create
POST {{host}}/v1/memories/
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "messages": [
    {}
  ],
  "agent_id": "string",
  "user_id": "string",
  "app_id": "string",
  "run_id": "string",
  "metadata": {},
  "includes": "string",
  "excludes": "string",
  "infer": true,
  "output_format": "v1.1",
  "custom_categories": {},
  "custom_instructions": "string",
  "immutable": false,
  "async_mode": true,
  "timestamp": 0,
  "expiration_date": "string",
  "org_id": "string",
  "project_id": "string",
  "version": "string"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful memory creation.
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Bad Request. Invalid input data. Please refer to the memory creation documentation at https://docs.mem0.ai/platform/quickstart#4-1-create-memories for correct formatting and required fields.
# Content-Type: application/json
